toc_content:
Requirements on Manifest Specification
AUTOSAR AP Release 18-10
Table of Contents
1 Scope of Document 4
2 Conventions to be used 4
3 Requirements Specification 4
3.1 Execution Manifest Overview : 5
3.1.1 Execution Manifest Requirements : 5
3.1.1.1 Application Design : 6
3.1.1.2 Execution : 11
3.2 Deployment Manifest Overview : 12
3.2.1 Deployment Manifest Requirements : 12
3.3 Machine Manifest Overview : 16
3.3.1 Machine Manifest Requirements : 16
3.4 System Design Overview : 19
3.4.1 System Design Requirements : 19
4 Requirements Tracing 20
5 References 22
6 Change History of this Document 23
6.1 Change History of this Document according to the original version of
the Document : 23
6.2 Change History of this document according to AUTOSAR Release 17-10 24

6.2.2 Changed Traceables in 17-10 : 24
